parameters.content:
##Publish Post from YouTube transcripts to WordPress & Telegram

### How it works

1. Triggers schedule to fetch YouTube playlist items via API.
2. Parses items to identify new videos and append them to a Google Sheet.
3. Fetches transcripts, processes, and stores them in Google Docs.
4. Generates blog content from YouTube videos using AI, saving updates to Google Sheets.
5. Publishes processed blog content to WordPress, including featured image creation and uploading.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Ensure Google Sheets API credentials are configured.
- [ ] Set up Telegram credentials for notifications.
- [ ] Configure YouTube API access for fetching playlist items.
- [ ] Set up access to the AI service for content and image generation.
- [ ] Set WordPress credentials for post publishing.

## Schedule and fetch YouTube

This group triggers the workflow and fetches YouTube playlist items.

## Process YouTube videos

Splits playlist items, extracts video IDs, and filters new videos against existing data.

## Log new videos

Appends new video information to a Google Sheet.

## Fetch and aggregate transcript

Fetches YouTube transcript using an API and aggregates lines for processing.

## Process transcript text

Cleans and combines transcript lines before saving them to Google Docs.

## Save and notify transcript

Saves the transcript link to Google Sheets and sends a notification.

## Schedule and get videos

Schedules the blog content generation and retrieves video data from Google Sheets.

## Filter and update video state

Filters unprocessed videos and marks them as processing in Google Sheets.

## AI content generation

Generates blog content from transcripts using AI and reads required references.

## Process AI output

Parses AI output and saves the blog content to Google Sheets.

## Notify content generation

Notifies via Telegram when content is generated.

## Schedule and get posts

Schedules publishing to WordPress and fetches pending posts.

## Select and publish post

Selects the post for publishing and submits it to WordPress.

## Generate and process image

Generates, downloads, and processes the featured image for posts.

## Upload and attach image

Uploads the processed image to WordPress and attaches it to the post.

## Publish and notify post

Posts the final content on Telegram and marks it as published in Google Sheets.

parameters.text: Call your available tools, analyze the content, and produce a JSON output. The output must be ONLY a JSON array — nothing else.

options.systemMessage:
You are a professional AI content analyst and writer for a Persian-language media outlet. You have access to two tools:
1. **Google Docs Tool** — read the YouTube video transcript
2. **blogsAndNewsUploaded_Read** — read previously published articles for internal linking

Call both tools, then produce structured JSON blog posts from the transcript. Output must be ONLY a valid JSON array.

parameters.text: ✅ Blog content generation complete for video transcript.
